hero.headline:
Book the right pro,
in seconds.
hero.subheadline: Describe your problem. Our AI instantly triages your request and connects you with the best local service professionals.

features.title: AI Triage
features.description: Describe your issue in plain language. Our AI understands context and urgency, categorizing your request instantly.

features.title: Instant Matching
features.description: Get matched with vetted local pros in your area based on service type, availability, and rating.

features.title: One-Click Booking
features.description: See real availability and book directly — no phone tag, no back-and-forth emails.

features.title: Verified Providers
features.description: Every professional is background-checked, licensed, and reviewed by real customers.

demo_steps.title: Describe Your Issue
demo_steps.description: Type what's wrong in plain English — as if texting a friend.

demo_steps.title: AI Triage
demo_steps.description: Our AI identifies the service type, urgency, and what to expect.

demo_steps.title: Pick Your Pro
demo_steps.description: Browse matched providers and book the one that fits your schedule.
